anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Pure Land nembutsu and Dogen practice-realization.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in universal scope. The model should be a teaching-transfer safety gate for extracted sentences, not a general theory of all spiritual language.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These may not be best understood as tools that repair a named modern wound. Nembutsu can function as entrusting gratitude under Other Power, and Dogen can refuse a separable tool-result model. Forcing them through a repair-survival gate may distort the native practice before it protects the borrower.

claim_units: Semantic similarity is not enough for responsible teaching transfer.
A comparison must ask whether the same wounded habit or practical problem is being corrected.
Authority and verification must not be silently replaced by the borrower.
The borrowed sentence must produce checkable ordinary conduct, not only private certainty.
If the repair task changes, the result is a new teaching proposal rather than shared wisdom.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: When these terms are borrowed without preserving the repair target and correction holder, misuse will vary predictably: boundaries becomes avoidance, resilience becomes overwork, safety becomes control, accountability becomes shame ritual, and exposure becomes coercion.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Terms such as boundaries, resilience, trauma-informed, accountability, psychological safety, and exposure carry repair targets, authority, verification, and expected conduct from their source settings.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Definitions alone transfer the terms safely across contexts, and misuse does not vary by repair mismatch, authority replacement, or receiver wound.

exact_claim: A borrowed spiritual sentence is not ready to teach because its meaning seems to fit. It is ready only if the repair target, authority, verification, and ordinary-life action survive the crossing. If the repair changes, it must be named and tested as a new medicine.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: In the Atman and anatta case, coders will find partial role-similarity in de-objectifying ordinary identity but different repair targets, verification norms, authority holders, and final practice aims.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Repair continuity adds information beyond semantic role similarity.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind coding of paired primary passages with fields for role, repair target, authority, verification, conduct, and final aim.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Dual-trained practitioners and scholars judge the repair to be the same after authority, verification, and practice aim are made explicit.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Witness, emptiness, surrender, detachment, and no-self will skew toward withdrawal, passivity, nihilism, private certainty, or self-erasure when used without their original correction holders.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Borrowed terms with repair mismatch produce predictable misuse.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Pre-registered cohort study of stable cross-tradition readers, coding borrowed term, named wound, action taken, and follow-up conduct.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Misuse is unrelated to repair mismatch after controlling for teacher support, community, mental-health risk, and prior practice.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Compared with ordinary journaling, stable supported users produce more concrete contact, duty completion, truth-telling, repair action, or rest without display, with no increase in shame or rumination.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The Repair Check changes practice outcomes for the target cohort.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Randomized pilot with Repair Check, ordinary journaling, and action-plan control arms.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Ordinary journaling, source checking, trusted conversation, or a simple action plan performs as well or better, or the check increases isolation and self-surveillance.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: A translation-strain team will downgrade some apparent convergences after adding repair target, authority, verification, and ordinary conduct fields.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The repair-survival field changes comparative scoring decisions.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: A/B scoring test on several comparison pairs, including Atman and anatta, apophatic darkness and emptiness, and fana or baqa and nondual realization.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Scores do not change beyond what Panikkar, Freiberger, Smith, spiritual-bypass screening, and current Lumenary word-role records already produce.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate adds a practice-design gate: the repair target and ordinary conduct must survive, not only conceptual function.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades novelty substantially; repair-survival is an extension of functional comparison.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close on comparing terms by functional role rather than surface sameness.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate turns rectification into a safety and teaching-readiness stopping rule for borrowed spiritual sentences.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on selection, description, juxtaposition, redescription, rectification, scale, and scope as explicit comparative operations.
near_neighbors.source: Oliver Freiberger, Elements of a Comparative Methodology in the Study of Religion, https://www.mdpi.com/2077-1444/9/2/38

near_neighbors.difference: Smith does not make repair continuity the threshold for spiritual practice publication.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Reduces novelty of the anti-false-convergence claim.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on comparison as scholarly construction and redescription rather than discovery of natural sameness.
near_neighbors.source: Jonathan Z. Smith, In Comparison a Magic Dwells, accessible PDF listing at https://classics.osu.edu/sites/classics.osu.edu/files/Magic_Dwells.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate adds receiver wound, repair target, and ordinary-life test as a local gate.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close on meaning depending on use, rules, and communal practice rather than isolated words.
near_neighbors.source: Wittgenstein language-games and forms of life, SEP, https://plato.stanford.edu/archives/fall2023/entries/wittgenstein/; Lindbeck cultural-linguistic doctrine, overview at https://readingreligion.org/9780664256040/the-nature-of-doctrine/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate focuses on a borrowed sentence becoming a new medicine when authority and verification change.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Authority and practice side is prior art.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on religious discourse being tied to proper practice, history, authority, and conditions of formation.
near_neighbors.source: Talal Asad, discursive tradition, discussion with source citation at https://www.scielo.org.za/scielo.php?pid=S1011-76012014000200004&script=sci_arttext

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate links bypass risk to translation strain and comparative teaching gates.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Receiver-wound insight is not new, but the combined gate is useful.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on spiritual language being used to avoid wounds, responsibility, emotion, and development.
near_neighbors.source: Spiritual bypassing literature and Pargament religious coping, overview at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spiritual_bypass and Pargament search trail https://psycnet.apa.org/record/1988-17166-001

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate applies contextual-risk logic to borrowed claims and public teaching readiness.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on similar experiences being interpreted and managed differently by practice, practitioner, relationship, health, and worldview context.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl et al., Varieties of Contemplative Experience, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

near_neighbors.difference: This record narrows the prior work to one stopping rule: stop calling it convergence when the repair changes.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade from candidate discovery to extended.
near_neighbors.overlap: Near exact local prior on source role, authority, receiver wound, word role, and misuse before teaching.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary prior: No Word Travels Alone and First Ask What the Words Do from project memory.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a standalone discovery. Cross-index with No Word Travels Alone, First Ask What the Words Do, Translation Strain as a Load Test for Convergence, and spiritual-bypass safety records.

Build one codebook with fields for source sentence, source role, repair target, authority holder, verification rule, receiver wound, bent meaning, dropped meaning, added meaning, ordinary action, warning, repair, and clinical exclusion.
Use split-source coding. Do not let the same passage establish role, repair target, and predicted warning.
Test the codebook against Panikkar, Freiberger, Smith, Asad, Lindbeck, spiritual bypassing, Pargament, and VCE baselines.
Pilot The Repair Check only with stable supported adults or older teens, and stop for rumination, panic, shame, derealization, compulsive confession, self-punishment, isolation, or clinical distress.
Add anomaly cases before public use: Pure Land nembutsu, Dogen practice-realization, Dzogchen pointing-out, sacramental speech, communal prayer, and non-instrumental ritual.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.47 to 0.36. The useful contribution is a narrower repair-survival stopping rule for Lumenary publication, not a new theory of comparison or religious language. Human-condition fit is stronger than novelty, but only for stable supported seekers facing meaning loss, digital comparison, loneliness, and achievement-contingent spiritual certainty. Lower publishability if the cohort, non-fit cases, and safety stops are not explicit.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is just homeomorphic equivalence plus spiritual bypassing, pastoral discernment, and ordinary comparative caution, and that the worksheet changes no concrete guidance.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners identify cases where repair-survival predicts specific warnings, repairs, and teaching downgrades better than source role, tradition label, teacher style, or generic bypass language.
questions: When a borrowed sentence fails in students, what concrete habit or wound does it fail to repair?
Does the repair-survival field change any comparison decision beyond homeomorphic equivalence, ordinary source criticism, teacher guidance, or spiritual-bypass screening?
Who normally holds correction for this sentence: teacher, text, ritual, vow, community, clinician, or ordinary duty?
Can you name a case where preserving the words but changing the repair produced harm or confusion?
Does this model help lonely or digitally overexposed seekers, or does it increase suspicion, shame, and isolation?
relevant_practitioners: clinicians familiar with spiritual bypassing and contemplative adverse effects

primary_pair: Dao De Jing 48, https://www.tao-te-ching.org/48, read against MN 1, https://obo.genaud.net/dhamma-vinaya/nmol/mn/mn1.001.nmol.pp.htm
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model risks forcing traditions into modern therapeutic repair language. Pure Land nembutsu, Dzogchen pointing-out, sacramental speech, Dogen practice-realization, communal prayer, and ritual duty may function through vow, grace, recognition, participation, or formation rather than a named wound. Human-condition fit is real but narrow: stable unsupported seekers facing meaning loss, digital comparison, loneliness, and achievement-contingent certainty. It is not fit for acute crisis, dissociation, psychosis, mania, severe depression, OCD or scrupulosity loops, addiction withdrawal, unsafe authority, or medical blackout concerns.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before public use, read Panikkar on homeomorphic equivalence, Freiberger on comparative method, Jonathan Z. Smith on comparison as redescription, Wittgenstein on language games, Lindbeck on doctrine as grammar, Asad on discursive tradition, Austin on speech acts, Pargament on religious coping, spiritual bypassing literature, and Lindahl and Palitsky on contemplative difficulties and worldview context.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: Brihadaranyaka 3.7.23 uses de-objectifying language to disclose an inner ruler and knower, while SN 22.59 uses the aggregates, including consciousness, to block ownership and self-identification. The overlap is a move away from ordinary object-self language, but the repair differs: one stabilizes an authority-bearing self, the other loosens clinging to anything as self. Dao De Jing 48 supports subtractive comparison, while MN 1 warns that the analyst can keep reintroducing hidden possession through the grammar of conceiving.

title: Stop When The Repair Changes
unlike_statement: Unlike Panikkar, Freiberger, Smith, Wittgenstein, Asad, spiritual bypassing, and VCE context research, this candidate says a borrowed spiritual sentence must be downgraded from convergence to new teaching whenever the repair target changes. That is a useful Lumenary gate, but most of its parts are established prior art.
